name: Denied comp in Utah for 'not work-related,' appeal steps?

mainEntity.name: Denied comp in Utah for 'not work-related,' appeal steps?

acceptedAnswer.description: Request written reasons, file objection with Labor Commission within 20 days; hearing follows.[2] Key factors: New evidence like witnesses. Practical guidance: Preserve all docs; get lawyer for hearing. Division assists informally first.[2] Appeals often succeed with prep.[1]
